name: huisheng
description: 让文字会说话，让声音有灵魂

scripts.pack:offline: vite build && electron-builder --dir && codesign --force --deep --sign - 'release/offline/mac-arm64/绘声.app' && electron-builder --prepackaged 'release/offline/mac-arm64/绘声.app'
scripts.pack:online: vite build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.online.yml --dir && codesign --force --deep --sign - 'release/online/mac-arm64/绘声.app' && electron-builder --config electron-builder.online.yml --prepackaged 'release/online/mac-arm64/绘声.app'
scripts.pack:mac: vite build && electron-builder --mac --dir && codesign --force --deep --sign - release/mac-arm64/绘声.app && electron-builder --mac --prepackaged release/mac-arm64/绘声.app && cp 使用说明.md user-guide.md 修复.command release/
